## Architecture impact
- [ ] No direct DB/NATS/secrets/object-storage/LLM access was added to a business module.
- [ ] Capability, permission, idempotency, event and audit contracts are preserved.
- [ ] Proto changes pass compatibility and breaking-change checks.
- [ ] Migration and rollback implications are documented.
